notes_md:
**Thì giờ** means *time*, usually your available or personal time to do something. It often implies free time or time you can control.

It’s an uncountable noun — you don’t use classifiers with it. Common pairings: **có/không có thì giờ**, **dành thì giờ cho…**, **mất/tốn thì giờ**.  

Very close to **thời gian**, but *thì giờ* feels more personal and practical (your own time), while *thời gian* is broader and more neutral.
notes:
Thì giờ means time, usually your available or personal time to do something. It often implies free time or time you can control.

It’s an uncountable noun — you don’t use classifiers with it. Common pairings: có/không có thì giờ, dành thì giờ cho…, mất/tốn thì giờ.  

Very close to thời gian, but thì giờ feels more personal and practical (your own time), while thời gian is broader and more neutral.
exampleSentences: Anh không có nhiều thì giờ để chuẩn bị cho kỳ thi này.
Chị muốn dành thì giờ cuối tuần để đi dã ngoại cùng bạn bè.
Em thường sử dụng thì giờ rảnh để học tiếng Anh hoặc đọc sách.
exampleSentencesTranslated: I don't have much time to prepare for this exam.
I want to spend time on the weekend going on a picnic with friends.
I often use my free time to study English or read books.
